test.name: TC02 - Realizar busca de um único produto

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://dummyjson.com/products/7 path_url=/products/7 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-type': 'application/json'} body=None
